item.title: It'd be nice to have rotten, shitty maleness called out as rotten and shitty more often.
item.description: MV Edit: Wow, this really resonates with a lot of people. Take this lesson to heart. Don't be that type of guy and/or don't accept that sort of behavior from others. The world is not obligated to give you whatever you want just because you want it.
item.dc:creator: Shaodyn

item.title: How to find hidden cameras in rentals and hotels
item.description:
(sound)
source: https://www.tiktok.com/@malwaretech malwaretech's website: https://www.malwaretech.com/ note: besides serious privacy risks like mentioned above, airbnb and others like it must be banned cuz they destroy affordable housing for locals: https://www.theinvisibletourist.com/why-you-shouldnt-use-airbnb-issues-you-didnt-know/

item.title: Everything is relative
item.description: Norwegian hospitals are free though. I was just surprised the first time I learned Norwegians pay at all to visit the doctor because I assumed we had the same system.

item.title: Day 243: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Hawaiian Swine Beef Patty, Roasted Garlic Aioli, Cheddar Cheese, Streaky Bacon, Grilled Pineapple, Tomato Relish, Red Onion, Tomato, Lettuce On A Milk Bun From Monroe's Burgers & Beers In Healesville, Victoria, Australia Previous Day 242: https://imgur.com/gallery/URS3ux0 MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: a 1990s throwback dump
item.description:
Gillian Anderson in Hawaii
90s Cambridge
Bob Saget hosting for America's Funniest Home Videos, 1990
Monica Bellucci
Jill Schoelen and Don Michael Paul singing 'Tear it Down' From "Rich Girl", a 1991 movie
Neighborhood kids
Nirvana Fans Interviewed by MTV News in 1992 Seattle
1998
Chyler Leigh
People in Times Square watching the Seinfeld finale 1998
Jaime King, 1996
Playing with N64, 1999
Robert De Niro and Don Rickles on the set of Casino, 1995
Girlfriends bathing in a German Town called Durlangen
In a McDonald's restaurant, 1993
Japanese Actor Yutaka Takenouchi
Aaliyah
90s Russia
Princess Diana on vacation with her family in St. Tropez, France in 1997
Finnish youth
1998
1999 high schoolers
item.dc:creator: Natot45Hanks

item.title: Abandoned Japan
item.description:
Seaside hotel
Giant hornet nest
Rooms have all the furniture still
Messy lobby
Amusement park
Giant mining apartment complex
Explored for hours and maybe only saw half
Old communal bath
This place has been abandoned for 50 years
Little guesthouse by the river
Loved the karaoke machine
Onsen hotel
Ski resort hotels
Old apartment of the owners?
Most of them look okay from the outside
Sometimes the rooms look completely untouched
Onsen
Ski lodge
This hotel was either untouched
Or completely destroyed by the broken roof
Often there is still food in the fridge
Like a horror movie
Could barely tell that it had been abandoned for so long
Once you leave the big city in Japan there are so many abandoned homes and hotels. Usually the doors are all unlocked and you can just walk in. Still full of stuff and barely vandalized. Most have been abandoned since the 90s when the price bubble burst.
item.dc:creator: ihavenosister
